title: Venezuelan Roasted Casserole
description: A hearty, flavorful casserole inspired by Venezuelan cuisine, made with roasted onions and topped with a crunchy, aerated crust.

ingredients.name: Casserole
ingredients.notes: Crushed and used as crust topping

instructions: Sauté chopped onions in a pan until caramelized, then set aside.
In a large bowl, mix crushed casserole with cooked onions and seasonings.
Spread the mixture in a baking dish and top with sliced Venezuelan bread.
Bake for 20 minutes, then broil for 5 minutes to crisp the crust.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
